en.name: Malaria
en.advice: Please visit the nearest health clinic immediately for a blood test. Malaria requires prompt treatment with antimalarial drugs.

am.name: ወባ
am.advice: እባክዎን በአስቸኳይ ለደም ምርመራ በአቅራቢያዎ ወደሚገኝ ጤና ጣቢያ ይሂዱ። ወባ በአፋጣኝ የፀረ-ወባ መድኃኒት ማግኘት ያስፈልገዋል።

or.name: Busa
or.advice: Maaloo hatattamaan qorannoo dhiigaatiif kilinika dhihoo jiru deemaa. Busaan qoricha farra-busaatiin hatattamaan yaalamuu qaba.

en.name: Typhoid Fever
en.advice: Consult a doctor for antibiotics. Ensure you drink safe, boiled, or purified water and eat well-cooked food.

am.name: ታይፎይድ
am.advice: ለፀረ-ባክቴሪያ መድኃኒቶች ሀኪም ያማክሩ። የተጣራ ወይም የፈላ ውሃ መጠጣትዎን እና በደንብ የበሰለ ምግብ መመገብዎን ያረጋግጡ።

or.name: Dhukkuba Xaayifoodii
or.advice: Qoricha farra-baakteeriyaaf ogeessa fayyaa mariisisaa. Bishaan qulqulluu ykn danfisame dhuguu fi nyaata gaariin bilchaate nyaachuu mirkaneessaa.

en.name: Acute Watery Diarrhea / Cholera
en.advice: High risk of dehydration. Drink ORS (Oral Rehydration Salts) immediately and seek emergency medical care.

am.name: አጣዳፊ ተቅማጥ
am.advice: ለድርቀት የመጋለጥ ከፍተኛ አደጋ አለው። ወዲያውኑ ኦአርኤስ (ORS) ይጠጡ እና የድንገተኛ ህክምና እርዳታ ይፈልጉ።

or.name: Teessisaa / Koleeraa
or.advice: Bishaan qaama keessaa xumuruu danda'a. Hatattamaan ashabboo (ORS) dhugaa, gargaarsa wal'aansaa hatattamaas barbaadaa.

en.name: Common Cold / Flu
en.advice: Rest well, drink plenty of warm fluids, and take paracetamol for fever. If symptoms persist for more than a week, see a doctor.

am.name: ጉንፋን
am.advice: በደንብ ያርፉ፣ ሞቅ ያሉ ፈሳሾችን በብዛት ይጠጡ፣ እና ለትኩሳት ፓራሲታሞል ይውሰዱ። ምልክቶቹ ከአንድ ሳምንት በላይ ከቆዩ ሀኪም ያማክሩ።

or.name: Qufaa
or.advice: Boqonnaa gahaa fudhadhaa, dhangala'aa ho'aa baay'inaan dhugaa, hoo'a qaamaatiif ammoo paraasitaamoolii fudhadhaa. Mallattoon kun torbee tokkoo ol yoo ture man-yaalaa deemaa.

en.name: Tuberculosis
en.advice: TB is curable but requires a strict medication regimen. Please visit a hospital for a sputum test or chest X-ray.

am.name: ቲቢ (የሳንባ ነቀርሳ)
am.advice: ቲቢ መዳን የሚችል በሽታ ነው፣ ነገር ግን ጥብቅ የሆነ የመድኃኒት ክትትል ይፈልጋል። እባክዎን ለአክታ ምርመራ ወይም ለደረት ራጅ ወደ ሆስፒታል ይሂዱ።

or.name: Dhukkuba Sombaa (TB)
or.advice: TBn dhukkuba fayyuudha garuu qoricha sirnaan fudhachuu gaafata. Qorannoo aakkayyee ykn x-rayii qomaatiif gara hospitaalaa deemaa.
